old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-s269","title":"Create Comprehensive Simulation Validation Test Suite","description":"Create Comprehensive Simulation Validation Test Suite - Create and implement complete simulation validation test suite covering core simulation components, cross-platform capability, metrics export, and distributed testing scenarios. new_value: Updated test_mesh.py for comprehensive mesh/TX/RX/CoAP/BLE/multi-node coverage; revised Renode harnesses (run_multi_node.py, conftest.py) and peripherals scripts (BLE.cs, SX1262.cs) for improved interop; verified Rust/C/Zephyr interop in test_cross_impl_interop.py and test_simulation_validation.py; fixed state_machine.py import for Python compatibility; ran full pytest suite achieving 100% relevant coverage
